text:
こんなところにもダーカーが！
ずいぶん派手な登場ね！

龍族に迷惑を
かけるわけにはいかない。
あのダーカーを倒さないと！

I can't believe there are Falspawn in a place
like this! They made quite the entrance!

We can't go bothering the Draconians. Let's
take these Falspawn down!
